channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: This slick tool monitors any web page for updates
item.description: Email newsletters are great. When there’s an update, it comes straight to your inbox. You don’t have to check a web page over and over again. But many websites don’t offer email updates.
item.dc:creator: Chris Hoffman, Fast Company

item.title: Is the stock market in an AI bubble?
item.description: When it comes to AI investments, “a lot of money is going to get wasted,” MIT professor Daron Acemoglu told Bloomberg.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Meta unveils Movie Gen, an AI model that can generate video with sound
item.description: Facebook owner Meta announced on Friday it had built a new AI model called Movie Gen that can create realistic-seeming video and audio clips in response to user prompts, claiming it can rival tools from leading media generation startups like OpenAI and ElevenLabs.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Alphabet’s Waymo will expand its robotaxi fleet with Hyundai EVs
item.description: Alphabet’s Waymo will add electric vehicles from South Korea’s Hyundai Motor to its robotaxi fleet, the companies said on Friday, as Waymo expands in the United States.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Civilization 7 makers work with Shawnee to bring sincere representation of the tribe to the game
item.description: MIAMI, Okla. (AP) — Shawnee Tribe Chief Ben Barnes grew up playing video games, including “probably hundreds of hours” colonizing a distant planet in the 1999 title Sid Meier's Alpha Centauri.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM LEE BREWER and MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The future of EV Charging looks a lot like an airport lounge
item.description: Charging companies and automakers increasingly see a need for stations with amenities: restaurants, good bathrooms, comfortable furniture, and canopies that shield from the rain, snow and sun.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Musk to attend Trump rally at site of attempted assassination
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk said he plans to attend former President Trump’s rally in battleground Pennsylvania this weekend, when Trump returns to the site where he survived the first assassination attempt on his life.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Cyber Leaders Exchange: Army, SSA and USCIS cyber chiefs on securing software through automation
item.description: Cybersecurity experts from the Army Software Factory, SSA and USCIS say letting developers drive security efforts drives up safety in code. The post Cyber Leaders Exchange: Army, SSA and USCIS cyber chiefs on securing software through automation first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Google's search engine's latest AI injection will answer voiced questions about video and photos
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google is injecting its search engine with more artificial intelligence that will enable people to voice questions about images and occasionally organize an entire page of results, despite the technology's past misadventures with misleading information.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Australia's online dating industry adopts code of conduct to keep users safer
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — A code of conduct will be enforced on the online dating industry to better protect Australian users after research found that three-in-four people suffer some form of sexual violence through the platforms, Australia’s government said on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: After Change Healthcare, HHS building cyber incident response team
item.description: In the wake of the Change Healthcare ransomware attack, HHS has been expanding its "one-stop shop" for working with the healthcare sector on cyber issues. The post After Change Healthcare, HHS building cyber incident response team first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Why determining the cost of cloud services cuts across an entire agency
item.description: Do you know your true cloud costs? The post Why determining the cost of cloud services cuts across an entire agency first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Details from New Mexico's lawsuit against Snap show site failed to act on reports of sextortion
item.description: Snapchat failed to act on “rampant” reports of child grooming, sextortion and other dangers to minors on its platform, according to a newly unredacted complaint against the company filed by New Mexico's attorney general. Attorney General Raúl Torrez filed the original complaint on Sept.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: iPhone stuck in SOS mode? Here's how to get out of it
item.description: There are ongoing reports of a widespread outage impacting multiple cellphone and internet providers Monday morning. According to Downdetector.com, AT&T, Verizon and T-Mobile users have all experienced issues.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, NewsNation

item.title: Appeals court reinstates Indiana lawsuit against TikTok alleging child safety, privacy concerns
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — The Indiana Court of Appeals has reinstated a lawsuit filed by the state accusing TikTok of deceiving its users about the video-sharing platform's level of inappropriate content for children and the security of its consumers’ personal information.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: IBM expands Nvidia GPU options for cloud customers
item.description: IBM is offering expanded access to Nvidia GPUs on IBM Cloud to help enterprise customers advance their AI implementations, including large language model (LLM) training.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: New Jersey offshore wind farm clears big federal hurdle amid environmental concerns
item.description: SEA GIRT, N.J. (AP) — The federal government gave a key approval Tuesday to an offshore wind farm in New Jersey, even as residents in the town where its power cable would come ashore worry it could go through underground toxic waste that's still being cleaned up. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: WAYNE PARRY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Cruise ship surgery that slices giants for mega profits
item.description: A whopping 30 million people will have taken cruises in 2024, and some ships being built to keep up with this demand cost as much as $2 billion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chinese EV tech ban not an overreaction: National security experts
item.description: A tech ban on EVs will limit the Chinese government from accessing data on American drivers, experts say.
item.dc:creator: Safia Samee Ali, NewsNation

item.title: Musk faces $1.9 million fine to end X ban in Brazil
item.description: Payment would allow X to “immediately return to its activities in national territory,” according to the country's court.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation
